# Otolith processing protocol

[Edit this page](https://github.com/remygatins/GatinsLab/edit/main/lab_gen_otoliths.qmd)

## Aging

1. Clean otolith with water
2. Identify the sulcus (axis running longways along otolith) and make a pencil mark perpendicular to this axis in the center of the otolith
3. Warm up Crystalbond on hot plate set to 110C (275F)
  3a. Use scalpel to cut small piece of Crystalbond in a weigh boat and place the cut pieces on a microscope slide sitting on hot plate. Ensure you cut enough Crystalbond to secure the otolith to the slide.
4. Stick the otolith into the Crystalbond while it is malleable. BE CAREFUL as Crystalbond that is too hot can shatter otoliths that contain small cracks.

## PLD
